evaluations_section.title: Match ratings
evaluations_section.description: Control what players and their families see of the ratings.

evaluations_visibility.label: Let players and families see their match ratings
evaluations_visibility.description: When enabled, each player (and their family) can see their individual score, the comment, the MVP and the team rating for each match. The coaching staff's private notes are never shown.
evaluations_visibility.default_hint: Off by default: only the coaching staff can see the ratings.
evaluations_visibility.read_only: Only the club admin can change this option.

error.forbidden: Only the club admin can change this option.

equipos.title: Equipos
equipos.open_season_confirm_description: You are about to open season {season}. The new season will be created and the teams will be cloned. Confirm?
equipos.upcoming_banner: Season {season} in preparation. Adjust the teams (add, remove or rename); players are reassigned in the next step.

open_season_error.forbidden: Only a club admin can open a season.
open_season_error.no_active_season: There is no active season to base it on.
open_season_error.generic: We couldn't open the season. Please try again.

reassign.title: Reassign players
reassign.subtitle: Place each current team's players into a team of the season being prepared. Nothing in the active season is closed or moved: the player stays in their current team and is also placed in the new one.
reassign.banner: Placing players from {active} into {upcoming}. {active} memberships are left untouched.
reassign.no_upcoming: Open the new season from Teams first to be able to reassign players.
reassign.no_dest_teams: The season being prepared has no teams yet. Create them before reassigning.
reassign.no_source_teams: There are no teams in the {season} season to start from.
reassign.no_players: This team has no active players.
reassign.placed_result: {count, plural, =0 {No one new: they were already placed.} one {1 player placed.} other {# players placed.}}
reassign.removed_result: Player removed from the new season.

pending.title: Pending
pending.subtitle: Current-season players not yet placed in the new one (left-club players don't count).
pending.baja_description: The player will no longer appear in the club's active list. All their history is kept. You can reactivate them anytime.

error.forbidden: Only a club admin can reassign players.
error.dest_team_invalid: The destination team is not valid.
error.dest_not_upcoming: The destination must be a team in the season being prepared.
error.not_upcoming: You can only unassign from the season being prepared.
error.player_invalid: The player does not belong to this club.
error.generic: We couldn't complete the operation. Please try again.

finalize.title: Finalize season
finalize.subtitle: Close the season rollover: the current season becomes historical and the season being prepared becomes the active one. This is the final handover step.
finalize.no_upcoming: Open the new season from Teams first: you can't finalize without a season to activate.
finalize.summary: You are about to finalize {active} and activate {upcoming}.
finalize.step_close: Open memberships of {active} teams are closed at the cut-off date (their history is kept).
finalize.step_activate: {upcoming} becomes the active season with its teams and already-placed players.
finalize.unplaced_title: {count, plural, one {1 player with no team in the new season} other {# players with no team in the new season}}
finalize.unplaced_hint: They are in a current-season team but haven't been placed in any new-season team. It may be intentional (leaving the club) or an oversight. Review them before continuing.
finalize.cutoff_hint: Date the current-season memberships are closed at. Defaults to the season end.
finalize.ack: I understand that the open memberships of {active} will be closed and the season will become historical.
finalize.ack_with_unplaced: I understand that the open memberships of {active} will be closed (including the {count} players with no team in the new season).

error.cutoff_invalid: The cut-off date is not valid.
error.cutoff_too_early: The cut-off date is earlier than a membership start in the season. Pick a later date.
error.forbidden: Only a club admin can finalize the season.
error.no_active_season: There is no active season to finalize.
error.no_upcoming: There is no season being prepared to activate.
error.generic: We couldn't finalize the season. Please try again.

informes.title: Development reports

informes.editor_rework_body: The scoring editor is being rebuilt with the new model (team assessment + individual report by catalog). Objectives are still available in the list.

informes.objective_review_hint: What has been achieved since the previous period (optional)
informes.objective_status_hint: “New” and “in progress” are set automatically from the creation period; here you choose whether the objective is still active, achieved, or dropped.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit this report.

informes.team_block_missing: There is no team valuation for this period yet. You can still save the individual report; it will be linked once you create it.
informes.no_season_for_team: The team has no valid season configured.
informes.roster_empty: The team has no active players.
informes.publish_hint: To share this report with the family, use the Publish button on the report view.

notificaciones.title: Notifications

push.title: Push on this browser
